steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: A 137% increase means the new value equals the original plus 137% of it: new = x + 1.37x = 2.37x. The answer is whichever choice equals 2.37x.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $4.86x$: this would make the increase $3.86x$, or 386% of the original, not 137%. ✗
  • Choice B — $0.63x$: smaller than x, so it represents a decrease, not an increase. ✗
  • Choice C — $1.37x$: represents only a 37% increase ($1.37x - x = 0.37x$). ✗
  • Choice D — $2.37x$: $2.37x - x = 1.37x$, which is exactly 137% of x. ✓
D is correct.
